description.value:
The earlier version of the King in Yellow tale, written by the Syrian poetess Fairuza of Tyre. Takes the form of an epic poem set to music and meant to be sung. Tells of a decadent royal family and the arrival of a god-king in tattered yellow robes with a pallid mask who usurps their throne.

LanguageAramaic
AuthorFairuza of Tyre
Date420 B.C.
Sanity Loss2D6
Cthulhu Mythos+1/+4 percentiles
Mythos Rating15
Study (weeks)2

Spells Contained

  • Call/Dismiss Hastur
  • Song of Hastur
  • The Yellow Sign

system.author: Fairuza of Tyre
system.spells: Call/Dismiss Hastur, Song of Hastur, The Yellow Sign
